reasoning: The question compares the daily average temperature at Millau on a late October date (2025-10-26) to a winter date (2026-01-24). Late October in Millau (elevation ~700m) typically has an average daily temperature around 9-11°C, whereas late January averages around 3-4°C. Assuming roughly normal variance natively for each day's average (standard deviation ~3.5 to 4.5°C) and independence between dates three months apart, the temperature difference (Jan 24 - Oct 26) has a mean of about -6.5°C to -7.5°C and a standard deviation around 5.5°C. The probability that the January date will be warmer than the October date corresponds to a normal distribution Z-score of roughly 1.25, giving a probability of about 10-12%. Therefore, my forecast is 0.11.
